metadata.name: umarket
metadata.description: A flexible lending protocol for Solana

accounts.name: escrow_token_account
docs: Escrow-owned token account to hold SPL payment

errors.name: PurchaseInProgress
errors.msg: A purchase is currently in progress

errors.name: NotOwner
errors.msg: You are not the owner of this resource

errors.name: UnauthorizedRole
errors.msg: You do not have the required role (buyer / seller)

errors.name: OfferNotAccepted
errors.msg: This offer has not been accepted

errors.name: RequestInactive
errors.msg: This request is no longer active

errors.name: QuantityInsufficient
errors.msg: Offer quantity is less than requested quantity

errors.name: InvalidDiscount
errors.msg: Discount percentage must be between 1 and 99

errors.name: InvalidPrice
errors.msg: Price or weight cannot be zero

errors.name: InvalidDeadline
errors.msg: Deadline must be in the future

errors.name: InvalidFee
errors.msg: Fee percentage must be between 0 and 99
